input_text:
Extracting the pagination logic into a shared helper module. The same pagination code (parse page/per_page params, apply limits, return metadata) is duplicated across 7 different endpoint files with minor variations. It's drifted — some handle edge cases, some don't, and the inconsistencies are causing subtle bugs.

New file: pagination.py with a single paginate(queryset, page, per_page, max_per_page=100) function. All 7 endpoints will use this instead.

This is a refactor to reduce duplication. No behavior changes.

expected.text: Extract duplicated pagination logic from 7 endpoint files into a single pagination.py with paginate(queryset, page, per_page, max_per_page=100) — all endpoints adopt this helper

reviewer_notes: Pure refactor to deduplicate drifted code paths.
